title: ranunculus orthorhynchus subsp. platyphyllus
intro: Ranunculus orthorhynchus subsp. platyphyllus, also known as platyphyllus buttercup, is a subspecies of the Ranunculus orthorhynchus plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the buttercup family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of platyphyllus buttercup include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
